importedDoc.text:
Solving Equations Worksheet

PROBLEMS:
1) 3x + 7 = 22
2) 2(x - 4) = 10
3) 5x - 3 = 2x + 12
4) x/4 + 6 = 11
5) -2x + 8 = 3x - 7
6) 4(2x + 1) = 36
7) 3x/5 = 9
8) 7 - x = 2x + 1

WORD PROBLEMS:
9) Sarah has 3 times as many stickers...
10) A rectangle's length is 5 more...
